text: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Eligibility: 1. Individual farmers who are owner-cultivators. 2. Tenant farmers, oral lessees, and sharecroppers. 3. Self-Help Groups (SHGs) or Joint Liability Groups (JLGs) of farmers. The scheme aims to provide timely and adequate credit for agricultural and allied activities like crop cultivation and post-harvest expenses.

Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Benefits: 1. Short-term credit for crop cultivation, post-harvest expenses, and marketing loans. 2. Working capital for farm assets, animal husbandry, and fisheries. 3. Interest subvention for prompt repayment. 4. Collateral-free loans typically available up to ₹1.6 lakh (may vary by bank). 5. Flexible repayment options based on harvest seasons.
